final:
module SyncCounter (
    input rst_clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
